description_long: This house features a classic, ornate facade with a prominent central tower and a steep mansard roof, accented by blue trim and white siding. The front porch is supported by multiple columns and arches, creating a welcoming entryway with decorative detailing. The windows are symmetrically arranged, with dormer windows on the upper floors and larger sash windows on the main levels. The roofline is complex, with multiple levels and a central tower capped by a small, decorative gable. The structure is boxy and vertically oriented, typical of late 19th-century residential architecture. The overall appearance is stately and elegant, with a strong emphasis on symmetry and decorative trim.
description: A stately, symmetrical house with a mansard roof, central tower, blue trim, and a columned front porch. Decorative details and multiple dormer windows give it a classic, ornate appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch with columns, central tower, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the side porch, multiple windows, and the depth of the central tower.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the central tower, dormer windows, and the symmetrical roofline.
description_view_3: Right side view with visible porch columns, side windows, and the continuation of the ornate trim.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front porch with columns, arches, decorative trim, and a prominent overhang.
